title: Microsoft SharePoint RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-20963 is a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability in Microsoft SharePoint that allows unauthorized attackers to execute arbitrary code. This vulnerability is being exploited in the wild with no available patch. Why now: This vulnerability is being actively exploited in the wild, posing a significant risk to affected systems.
